name: Delhi Rajasthan Taj Mahal with Varanasi Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer, Udaipur, Varanasi with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the h
itinerary.description: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel.Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Delhi sightseeing: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit Jama Masjid, Re
itinerary.description: Delhi sightseeing: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, President House, Parliament, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Humayun’s Tomb, Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Delhi – Mandawa (260 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi – Mandawa (260 Kms. 6 Hrs. approx.): Today, after breakfast, drive to Mandawa & checked in at the hotel. Evening a guided walking tour to visit old painted houses (Havelis). Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Mandawa – Bikaner (200 kms
itinerary.description: Mandawa – Bikaner (200 kms. 4 hrs.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Bikaner and visit Bikaner Fort (JunaGarh Fort). After checking in the hotel Proceed to visit Deshnok Temple. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Bikaner – Jaisalmer(340 kms
itinerary.description: Bikaner – Jaisalmer(340 kms. 6 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Jaisalmer. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast check out from the hotel and visit Jaisalmer fort, Patwon-
itinerary.description:
Today after breakfast check out from the hotel and visit Jaisalmer fort, Patwon-ki haveli and after lunch, proceed to Khuri/Sam (SanDunes Desert Village) and enjoy village and dunes sun set point by camel ride and back to desert camp, Rajasthani Folk Dance , Dinner. Rest of the day at leisure.
Day 07; Khuri – Jodhpur (270 kms. 6 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Jodhpur. Visit Jodhpur Fort Mehrangarh and Jaswant Thada. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur – Ranakpur (200 kms
itinerary.description: Jodhpur – Ranakpur (200 kms. 3 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Ranakpur & visit Ranakpur Jain Temple. after lunch drive to Udaipur & Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Ranakpur – Udaipur (100 kms
itinerary.description: Ranakpur – Udaipur (100 kms. 3 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Udaipur. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Udaipur sightseeing: Today after breakfast, proceed to visit Jagdish Temple, Cit
itinerary.description: Udaipur sightseeing: Today after breakfast, proceed to visit Jagdish Temple, City Palace, Princes Garden (Sahelio Ki Badi), and Boat Ride . Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Udaipur – Pushkar(280 kms
itinerary.description: Udaipur – Pushkar(280 kms. 6 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Pushkar Hindu holy city. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Pushkar – Jaipur (150 kms
itinerary.description: Pushkar – Jaipur (150 kms. 3 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast Visit Brahma Temple, Camel Fare Ground and proceed to Jaipur. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Jaipur sightseeing: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit the ancient ca
itinerary.description: Jaipur sightseeing: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit the ancient capital of Amer. Visit the beautiful Amer Fort, Hawa Mahal(Window Palace), City Place and Observatory(Jantar Mantar), visiting famous block printing & James & Stone cutting factory work being done for centuries in Jaipur. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Jaipur – Agra VIA Fatehpur Sikri(260 kms
itinerary.description: Jaipur – Agra VIA Fatehpur Sikri(260 kms. 6 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Jaipur on the way to Fatehpur Sikri.Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Agra sightseeing: Today, a guided tour to visit Taj Mahal, Agra Fort , and visit
itinerary.description: Agra sightseeing: Today, a guided tour to visit Taj Mahal, Agra Fort , and visiting famous fine marble inlay work which is still being done in Agra. Rest of the day at leisure .

itinerary.title: Agra – Orchha(260 kms
itinerary.description: Agra – Orchha(260 kms. 6 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Orchha and visit Orchcha fort & free for walking tour. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Orchha – Khajuraho(180 kms
itinerary.description: Orchha – Khajuraho(180 kms. 4 hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Khajuraho. Rest of the at leisure.

itinerary.title: Khajuraho sightseeing: Today after breakfast proceed to sightseeing and visit We
itinerary.description: Khajuraho sightseeing: Today after breakfast proceed to sightseeing and visit Western Temples and Jain Temples. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Khajuraho – Varanasi(400 kms
itinerary.description: Khajuraho – Varanasi(400 kms. 9 hrs. approx.): Today, after breakfast drive to Varanasi. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Varanasi sightseeing: Today early morning boat ride on the holy river Ganges to
itinerary.description: Varanasi sightseeing: Today early morning boat ride on the holy river Ganges to see the famous bathing Ghats site. After breakfast, visit Vishwanath temple, Sankat mochan temple, BHEU & Sarnath. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast drop you at Varanasi Airport/Railway station for your onwa
itinerary.description:
Today after breakfast drop you at Varanasi Airport/Railway station for your onward journey .
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
